name: Monte Iberia Eleuth
conservationEfforts: Parque Nacional Alejandro de Humboldt protects habitat. Research by Cuban herpetologists. No captive populations exist due to extreme difficulty of husbandry.
description: One of the smallest frogs in the world at just 10 mm long. Found only on a single mountain in eastern Cuba. It is toxic, using alkaloids similar to poison dart frogs for defense.
